textByHash.ec6aab74cd902e76f18a11c1cc320c99e5b79113: You can challenge someone to a game anywhere in the Games Zone (except on a PvP or Deadman world) by using the right click option.
textByHash.267f31933fae55a9d276a3a65ccc3f882c09d857: Choose the type of game and then choose the options you want such as time per move.
textByHash.44d129547116d6f31bdefd797129686887d264b0: If your opponent accepts the challenge you will be taken to one of the tables around where you will play your game of choice.
textByHash.de5ea85c9098295cb7b1e6ed939d97f0ab87faef: Once you have finished your game you will come back here where you can challenge again! We also have tables in a few pubs around the world!
textByHash.d8afb38bf56d0d00cc6e0a699291674834f50eaf: Currently we offer Draughts, Runelink, Runesquares, and Runeversi.
textByHash.c3e8feb6a0fa20736aea09cd76c94c8b46003585: Draughts uses standard rules, apart from: a draw is declared if no piece has been taken or promoted for forty moves.
textByHash.6216d10d683e254c99133d1a354a158d84813af1: Yup, you have to get four runes in row.
textByHash.d788985a14e533c7e402c8a7f6dd3511b9559fa6: Yes, you take it in turns to add a line with the goal of making squares. Everytime you make a square you take another turn.
textByHash.565780375a0d37411bdd3a3f9762ba05cc135d34: Yep, the aim is to have more of your runes on the board than your opponent. You can take your opponents pieces by trapping them between your own.
textByHash.60f0b6f2fd084a387106443ba9261ca401a35deb: I'm afraid I don't sell drinks.
textByHash.64cbd1d9488392b5c62dbe639ac22fb467cf815f: Unfortunately we do not offer board game playing on this world. Try logging onto a non-PvP or Deadman world!
